name: claude-skills
description: Monorepo of Claude Code plugins by Ricardo Arturo Cabral Mejía.

plugins.name: wallabag
plugins.description: Save, search, and manage read-it-later articles via your Wallabag instance.

plugins.name: actual-budget
plugins.description: Interact with your self-hosted Actual Budget instance — check balances, add transactions, and query budgets.

plugins.name: technitium-dns
plugins.description: Manage Technitium DNS Server instances — configure, query stats, manage zones and records, and control DNS blocking with per-domain allow/block overrides and block list URLs.

plugins.name: nats
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code agents over NATS — discover agents, expose capabilities as services, and invoke them point-to-point or broadcast.

plugins.name: paperless
plugins.description: Upload documents to and search a Paperless-ngx instance via its REST API.

plugins.name: scheduler
plugins.description: Schedule tasks using natural language — 'every 3 minutes', 'every weekday at 9am', 'once in 5 minutes'. Fires channel notifications when tasks are due.

plugins.name: elevenlabs
plugins.description: Generate speech, transcribe audio, create music and sound effects, and build voice agents using the ElevenLabs API.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control, pairing, and full Bot API coverage including voice note transcription.

plugins.name: nostr
plugins.description: Nostr channel for Claude Code — decentralized messaging over Nostr relays with DM pairing, allowlists, relay pool management, and NIP-04 encrypted DMs.

plugins.name: jj
plugins.description: Jujutsu (jj) version control system skill — stack-based workflows, change curation, and jj best practices for Git-compatible VCS.

plugins.name: webhooks
plugins.description: Receive webhook events from external systems (GitHub, Stripe, CI/CD, etc.) as channel notifications. Express listener with BullMQ processing, HMAC-SHA256 verification, IP allowlisting, and endpoint management.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomously optimize Claude Code skills using Karpathy's autoresearch methodology — binary evals, prompt mutation, and iterative improvement loops.

plugins.name: docker-maintenance
plugins.description: Maintain Docker Compose services and custom images — update base images, pin sha256 digests, manage Containerfile/Dockerfile dependencies, test builds, and log all changes.

plugins.name: netshoot
plugins.description: Network troubleshooting inside Docker container networks using nicolaka/netshoot.
